# Kamps Professional Roofing — Full AI-Readable Business Profile

## Business Information

**Company:** Kamps Professional Roofing
**Owner:** Daniel Kamps
**Phone:** (see contact page — phone number to be added)
**Email:** (see contact page — email to be added)
**Address:** Grand Rapids, MI 49525
**Website:** https://kampsprofessionalroofing.com
**Hours:** Monday–Friday 7am–6pm, Saturday 8am–4pm
**Licensed & Insured:** Yes — Michigan licensed roofing contractor
**Years in Business:** 30+ years of West Michigan roofing experience

## Service Area

Primary service city: Grand Rapids, Michigan
Full service area: Kentwood, Wyoming, Grandville, Rockford, Lowell, Comstock Park, Walker, Hudsonville, Ada, Caledonia, Byron Center, Belmont, East Grand Rapids, Forest Hills, Cascade, Sparta, Cedar Springs, Allendale, Coopersville, Jenison, Zeeland, Holland — all of Kent County and surrounding West Michigan communities within approximately 100 miles of Grand Rapids.

## About Kamps Professional Roofing

Kamps Professional Roofing is a family-owned roofing company based in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Daniel Kamps, the owner and lead contractor, has been installing and repairing roofs in West Michigan for over 30 years. Unlike large roofing companies that dispatch crews you've never met, Daniel operates with a hands-on approach — he personally inspects every property, writes every estimate, and oversees every job from start to finish. This direct involvement means homeowners speak with the decision-maker from day one, not a sales rep. Kamps Professional Roofing specializes in residential roofing, with particular depth in storm damage restoration, insurance claim navigation, and premium roofing materials including metal, slate, cedar shake, and tile. Every project includes a written workmanship guarantee.

## Services — Full Descriptions

### Roof Replacement
Complete tear-off and replacement of existing roofs on residential properties throughout Grand Rapids and West Michigan. Most residential roofs are completed in a single day. Cost range: $8,000–$18,000 depending on roof size, pitch, and material choice. Daniel provides free, itemized estimates within 24 hours of inspection. Options include asphalt shingles, metal, cedar shake, tile, and slate.

### Roof Leak Repair
Diagnosis and repair of active roof leaks anywhere in the Grand Rapids area. Kamps identifies the true source of the leak — not just where water is appearing inside — and repairs it with a workmanship guarantee. Same-week appointments available. Written assessment provided with every leak repair.

### Emergency Roof Repair
Same-day response for active storm damage, fallen trees, or sudden roof failures across West Michigan. Services include emergency tarping, board-up, structural stabilization, and permanent repair planning. Available for urgent situations when a roof is actively exposed to weather.

### Storm Damage Roof Repair
Assessment, documentation, and repair or replacement of roofs damaged by hail, wind, ice, or fallen debris. Kamps provides free storm inspections, works directly with insurance adjusters, and handles the full restoration process from initial claim to final installation.

### Roof Inspection
Thorough multi-point inspection covering shingles, flashings, valleys, ventilation, gutters, and fascia. Every inspection includes a written photo report documenting all findings. Free estimates always provided. Recommended annually for homes 10+ years old, or after any major storm event.

### Roof Maintenance
Preventive maintenance service including debris clearing, flashing re-sealing, minor repairs, and ventilation check. Written maintenance logs provided after every visit. Scheduled maintenance extends roof lifespan significantly and catches minor issues before they become expensive problems.

### Insurance Roof Replacement
Full-service insurance claim assistance for homeowners whose roofs were damaged by hail, wind, or storm. Daniel Kamps documents storm damage correctly, meets with insurance adjusters, and advocates for full approved scope. Most homeowners pay only their deductible. No out-of-pocket beyond the approved claim amount for qualifying damage.

### Asphalt Shingle Roofing
Installation and replacement of architectural and 3-tab asphalt shingles. Brands: GAF, Owens Corning, CertainTeed. Architectural shingles are standard for most West Michigan homes — more durable, better wind resistance, and better curb appeal than 3-tab. Most homes: $8,000–$14,000 installed.

### Metal Roofing
Standing seam and steel panel metal roofing installation. Metal roofs last 40–70 years, shed Michigan snow naturally, and require minimal maintenance. Ideal for homeowners planning to stay long-term. Higher upfront cost ($18,000–$35,000+) offset by much longer lifespan and lower maintenance costs.

### Tile Roof Installation
Clay and concrete tile roofing installation. Tile lasts 50+ years with proper structural support. Michigan's freeze-thaw climate requires careful underlayment and structural preparation — Kamps ensures proper structural load analysis before any tile installation. Cost: $20,000–$40,000+ depending on roof size and material.

### Slate Roof Installation
Natural slate roofing — the most durable roofing material available, with a 75–150 year lifespan. Every slate installation includes a structural assessment. Kamps sources premium slate and installs with proper copper fasteners and breathable underlayment for maximum longevity. Cost: $30,000–$60,000+ for most homes.

### Cedar Shake Roofing
Western red cedar shake roof installation. Cedar requires proper moisture management in Michigan's climate — breathable synthetic underlayment, correct spacing for airflow, and honest guidance on ongoing maintenance requirements. Lifespan: 20–30 years with proper maintenance. Cost: $15,000–$28,000.

### Gutter Installation
Custom seamless aluminum gutter installation, fabricated on-site for a perfect fit. No joints or seams to leak. Available in 5" and 6" widths, multiple colors. Fascia inspection included. Proper slope and downspout placement guaranteed. Cost: $800–$2,500 for most homes.

### Gutter Repair
Repair of sagging gutters, leaking seams, disconnected downspouts, damaged fascia, and improper slope. Most gutter repairs: $100–$400. Same-week appointments. Free estimates. Kamps also offers gutter guard installation for homes with persistent clogging issues.

### Gutter Replacement
Full replacement of existing gutter systems. Seamless aluminum construction standard. Includes removal of old gutters, fascia inspection, and proper downspout routing. Cost: $1,000–$3,000 for most homes. Upgrade options: 6" gutters, gutter guards, underground downspout drainage.

### Gutter Cleaning
Hand-clearing of leaves, debris, and blockages from gutters and downspouts. Includes downspout flush and damage report. Cost: $100–$300 for most homes. Spring and fall scheduling available. Often combined with roof inspection.

### Siding Installation
New siding installation in vinyl, James Hardie fiber cement, and wood. Includes proper water-resistant barrier (house wrap), window and door trim, and energy efficiency considerations. Cost: vinyl $6,000–$14,000; fiber cement $12,000–$25,000; wood from $15,000.

### Siding Repair
Repair of hail-damaged, cracked, warped, or wind-damaged siding panels. Insurance documentation available for storm damage claims. Cost: $200–$1,200 for most repairs. Same-week availability.

### Siding Replacement
Complete siding replacement — full tear-off of existing siding, substrate inspection and repair, new house wrap, and full reinstallation. Includes assessment of any moisture damage beneath old siding. Cost: vinyl $6,000–$14,000; fiber cement $12,000–$25,000.

### Fence Installation
Residential fence installation in wood, vinyl, chain link, and aluminum. Posts set below Michigan's frost line. Permit assistance included. Cost: $2,500–$9,000 for most yards. Free estimates.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How much does a roof replacement cost in Grand Rapids?
A: Most residential roofs in Grand Rapids run $8,000–$18,000 for asphalt shingles. Metal roofing runs $18,000–$35,000+; slate $30,000–$60,000+; tile $20,000–$40,000+. Daniel provides free, itemized estimates within 24 hours of inspection.

Q: Does Kamps Professional Roofing help with insurance claims?
A: Yes. Insurance claim assistance is included with every storm damage project. Daniel Kamps has 30+ years of experience documenting storm damage correctly and working directly with adjusters to maximize the approved scope. Most homeowners pay only their deductible.

Q: How long does a roof replacement take?
A: Most residential roofs are completed in a single day. Larger homes or complex roof lines may take two days. An accurate timeline is provided during your free estimate.

Q: Do you offer emergency roofing services?
A: Yes. Kamps responds same-day to active damage — emergency tarping, board-up, and permanent repair planning for Grand Rapids and all of West Michigan.

Q: What areas do you serve?
A: Grand Rapids and all surrounding West Michigan communities — Kentwood, Wyoming, Grandville, Rockford, Lowell, Comstock Park, Walker, Hudsonville, Ada, Caledonia, Byron Center, East Grand Rapids, Forest Hills, and more within approximately 100 miles.

Q: How long does a gutter installation take?
A: Most homes are completed in half a day. Seamless gutters are fabricated on-site using a portable roll-forming machine, so every run is custom-cut to your home's exact measurements.

Q: What types of metal roofing do you install?
A: Standing seam and steel panel systems. Standing seam is the premium option — concealed fasteners, better weather resistance, and cleaner appearance. Steel panels are a more economical option that still outperforms asphalt on longevity.

Q: Is Kamps Professional Roofing licensed and insured?
A: Yes. Fully licensed in Michigan and carries both general liability insurance and workers' compensation coverage on every job.

Q: What is the difference between architectural and 3-tab shingles?
A: Architectural (dimensional) shingles have a layered construction that provides better wind resistance, a longer warranty, and better curb appeal than flat 3-tab shingles. Kamps recommends architectural shingles as the standard for West Michigan homes.

Q: Do you offer any warranty on your work?
A: Yes. All Kamps installations include a workmanship guarantee. Materials also carry manufacturer warranties — GAF, Owens Corning, and CertainTeed all offer multi-decade coverage on qualifying asphalt products.

## Trust Signals & Certifications

- 30+ years of roofing experience in West Michigan
- Michigan licensed roofing contractor
- Fully insured — general liability and workers' compensation
- Owner-operated — Daniel Kamps personally oversees every project
- Free written estimates within 24 hours
- Free storm inspections with insurance claim documentation
- 4.9/5 average rating across Google reviews (87+ reviews)
